## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off engagement between Ambient and GrowthX to improve Ambient's marketing efforts and drive growth.](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ambient has strong product/tech but underdeveloped marketing (Series B company with Series A marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Key focus areas: content creation, SEO, brand awareness, inbound lead gen](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Target industries: tech companies, manufacturing, museums, universities/schools](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Success metrics: increased inbound pipeline, website traffic, demo requests, account-level awareness](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Company & Product Overview

  - [Founded 2017, AI-powered video analytics for physical security](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [60+ enterprise customers including Tesla, SpaceX, NVIDIA, Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Key use cases: threat detection, access control optimization, forensic investigation](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Differentiator: Most advanced solution but poorly marketed vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### Current Marketing State

  - [Limited content/digital presence (only recently started regular blog/social posts)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Primarily outbound sales motion via SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [Weak SEO, branding, website](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [No paid advertising due to lack of creative resources](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Primary: Head of Physical Security](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Secondary: IT teams (for technical validation)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Focus industries: Tech companies, manufacturing, museums, universities/schools](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
  - [US-focused, not targeting federal gov (no FedRAMP)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Zero Eyes, Vault.ai (startups with better marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Legacy player: Verkada (successful with SMBs)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Point solutions for specific use cases (e.g. gun detection only)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1067.0)

### Sales Process & Challenges

  - [Typically replacing/augmenting legacy video management systems (VMS)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Main objection: "do nothing" despite acknowledging need](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=2990.0)
  - [Some losses due to price (premium solution) or perceived complexity](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3061.0)

### Marketing Goals

  - [Dramatically increase inbound pipeline/demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3229.0)
  - [Expand brand awareness and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3198.0)
  - [Enable rapid, high-quality, personalized campaign execution](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3147.0)
  - [Improve ABM capabilities for enterprise accounts](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3275.0)

### Current Tech Stack

  - [ZoomInfo (list building)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)
  - [Outreach (SDR outbound)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)
  - [HubSpot (marketing automation)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)
  - [Salesforce (CRM)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3373.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to create brand guidelines and research artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Ambient to share additional documents (customer pain points, competitor battle cards, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore leveraging Ambient's GPT model analyzing sales call transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=3523.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin work on content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/1uMqHycesVXXsBYxg7xXKszNJyuoixGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
